node_scope: Krea2 BBOX optional human pose/gesture injector only. Not a general prompt manager.

scopes.description: Hand and arm gestures; the default and most important scope.
Arms, shoulders, chest, neck, and torso pose cues.
Eye direction and gaze cues, separate from facial expression.
Head and neck direction cues, not facial expression.

scopes.display_name: Sitting & Lying / 座り・寝そべり
scopes.description: Floor, chair, kneeling, crouching, and lying poses.
Genre-like poses such as hip-hop, dance, breakdance, Japanese manner, model, and battle.
